name: Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and garlic until soft.
2. Add mushrooms, carrots, and peppers to the pan. Cook until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in tomatoes, parsley, basil, oregano, chili powder, rosemary, and pepper. Simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Mix together the cheeses: mozzarella, grated Romano, and cottage cheese.
5. Arrange 8 cooked lasagna noodles on a baking dish.
6. Spoon half of the sauce onto the noodles.
7. Sprinkle with cheese.
8. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
9. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
